
  worktree ~/Code/demo/.claude/worktrees/review (worktree of ~/Code/demo)

       introduces no regression; try to break each with a concrete trigger, then write your
       findings (use the Write tool) to: /tmp/verify-grok.md


     Summary of actions performed
     • Read VERIFY-BRIEF.md + FIXES.diff.
     • Opened the post-fix sources and ran the critical test files: all relevant units green.
     • Adversarial analysis + concrete triggers for each of the 6 fixes.

     High-level verdicts
     All 6 close the described money bugs. Pagination, lease semantics, the null guard, and
     the pad-to-14 are correct on the exercised paths.                                                                                                                                                  █
